title: Verify event: trial-corner-widget-viewed
description: Test that the 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is triggered when the homepage widget or pill is visible to the user.
preconditions: User is eligible for Trial Corner
expected_result: The 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is fired with the correct 'which varient' attribute (e.g., 'home-trial-active', 'pill').
